pr.title: ArjunAutoResearch: MLP 3x + STE int6 QAT + seq4096 + sliding window. val_bpb 1.1632

output.summary: Agent-composed wider MLP/seq4096, optimizer tweaks, STE int6 QAT, and sliding-window eval yielded 1.1632 val_bpb with a 16MB int6 artifact.
techniques: Agent-assembled wider MLP, longer context, and tuned optimizer under 10-minute budget
STE int6 QAT plus per-row quantization with fp16 tied embedding passthrough for tight artifact budget
Sliding-window evaluation across 4096-context windows with stride 64 for dense scoring
